name: Adorabat alt
description:
An alt i wanted to make since I got the inspiration and didnt want to waste it. Your her husband and she just came back with your child: marble (im am entrusting you freaks... don't the small bat boy...) after a mission (which you had to stay behind on for reasons you can come up with) your wandering adventures, right now tho, your in your home for a break until your next mission. Have fun (p.s adorabat's 36 for tome reasons, if she was 20 like in the original bot. . . she would have been 4 when she had him...)

I made her more valentines day themed, and changed the personality a bit plz tell me if you like it it helps my motivation to make more bots you guys want
creator: Khyden
